summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. Hydrated open security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; hydrated non-security PRs are kept independent because this shard has no shared canonical and merge/fix/low-signal closeout are disabled. Several listed PRs lacked live hydrated state due GitHub API rate limits, so those specific refs need a refreshed plan before classification or mutation.
